TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-28-2002 IN 503, PROVE-UP HEARING AS TO DEFT WESTERN MACARTHUR BY PLFT DONALD MCCUAIG (ASBESTOS) APPEARANCE: CHRIS ANDREAS, ESQ. OF BRAYTON-PURCELL, 415/898-1555 ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF(S). NO APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF WESTERN MACARTHUR. MATTER WAS SUBMITTED ON THE PAPERS. REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF DONALD J. MCCUAIG AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR CO. IN THE SUM OF $211,800.00 PLUS COSTS AND INTEREST AS PROVIDED BY LAW, IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED LATER BY THE COURT. THE COURT SUA SPONTE TOOK MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION ON MAY 28, 2002. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; MATTER WAS NOT REPORTED (503)
> CALAVERAS CEMENT CO

LETTER FROM BRAYTON-PURCELL DATED 5-24-02 CONFIRMING WESTERN MACARTHUR DEFAULT HEARINGS FOR 5-28-02.
